title: Semantic Elements in HTML
description: Semantic Elements in HTML documents overview material for Semantic HTML Elements in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page provides focused notes, examples, commands, diagrams, or references when the source content provides them. Important search terms include semantic elements, semantic elements in html, semantic-elements, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / semantic-elements / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
